task_completion.description: Open the properties or point list of the fells_loop track/route to determine the halfway point by distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Garmin BaseCamp showing a properties window or point list for 'fells_loop', with distance measurements visible to identify the midpoint.

task_completion.description: Create a new waypoint at the identified halfway location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new waypoint being created on the map at the halfway point, or a waypoint creation dialog open with coordinates matching the halfway point.
The waypoint properties dialog or list view showing the name 'Lunch_Stop' for the new waypoint.

task_completion.description: Add the text 'Halfway rest point' to the waypoint's notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Notes' or 'Comments' field in the waypoint properties dialog containing the exact text 'Halfway rest point'.

task_completion.description: Export the 'Lunch_Stop' waypoint to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog in BaseCamp showing the file being saved as 'lunch_stop.gpx' in the 'C:\workspace\output\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Garmin BaseCamp interface (menus, map, properties dialogs) rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are shown executing scripts to directly create or modify the output GPX file.

integrity.description: The agent actively searched for the midpoint using the application's data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen viewing the track/route point list and distances, rather than instantly jumping to a hardcoded coordinate.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: C:\workspace\output\lunch_stop.gpx. Expected waypoint name: Lunch_Stop. Expected notes: Halfway rest point. Note: The provided fells_loop.gpx file contains route points (<rtept>) instead of track points (<trkpt>). BaseCamp may display this as a Route rather than a Track. The agent should still find the midpoint of this route/track and create the waypoint.
